Now the interactive menu has two new entries under Setup:

You can test it by running `dreamcontext` and navigating to Setup. You'll see the new options alongside the existing "Initialize project" and "Install skill".

Removed all 7 duplicate `agentcontext` hooks. Next `/clear` should work cleanly.
